item.title: PixelProps Beta [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: PixelProps Beta [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: t3sl4
item.itunes:summary:
PixelProps Beta
(Utilities)
Welcome to the official PixelProps Pling page! This is where you can download the latest Pixel Beta props. These props are designed with a focus on functionality and compatibility.
One of the key features of our Pixel Beta props is their ability to pass both Basic and Device Integrity checks within PlayIntegrity. This ensures that they integrate well with your device and applications.

As the sole developer behind PixelProps, I am committed to maintaining and updating the Pixel Beta props. Your feedback and experience are important to me, and they help in making PixelProps better.

Thank you for choosing PixelProps. Enjoy exploring our Pling page and feel free to reach out if you have any questions or feedback. I’m here to help!
[read more]
item.description:
PixelProps Beta
(Utilities)
Welcome to the official PixelProps Pling page! This is where you can download the latest Pixel Beta props. These props are designed with a focus on functionality and compatibility.
One of the key features of our Pixel Beta props is their ability to pass both Basic and Device Integrity checks within PlayIntegrity. This ensures that they integrate well with your device and applications.

As the sole developer behind PixelProps, I am committed to maintaining and updating the Pixel Beta props. Your feedback and experience are important to me, and they help in making PixelProps better.

Thank you for choosing PixelProps. Enjoy exploring our Pling page and feel free to reach out if you have any questions or feedback. I’m here to help!
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
PixelProps Beta
(Utilities)
Welcome to the official PixelProps Pling page! This is where you can download the latest Pixel Beta props. These props are designed with a focus on functionality and compatibility.
One of the key features of our Pixel Beta props is their ability to pass both Basic and Device Integrity checks within PlayIntegrity. This ensures that they integrate well with your device and applications.

As the sole developer behind PixelProps, I am committed to maintaining and updating the Pixel Beta props. Your feedback and experience are important to me, and they help in making PixelProps better.

Thank you for choosing PixelProps. Enjoy exploring our Pling page and feel free to reach out if you have any questions or feedback. I’m here to help!
[read more]

item.title: mpo1221o [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: mpo1221o [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: mpo1221o
item.itunes:summary:
mpo1221o
(Education Apps)
titik untuk menjadi okb adalah bermain di mpo1221o dengan rasio menang 9:1 yang besar dan menyenangkan. tindak kecurangan akan langsung di tindak di tempat dan juga keamanan tingkat tinggi yang pasti untuk membuat para pemain merasa nyaman.
[read more]

mpo1221o
(Education Apps)
titik untuk menjadi okb adalah bermain di mpo1221o dengan rasio menang 9:1 yang besar dan menyenangkan. tindak kecurangan akan langsung di tindak di tempat dan juga keamanan tingkat tinggi yang pasti untuk membuat para pemain merasa nyaman.

mpo1221o
(Education Apps)
titik untuk menjadi okb adalah bermain di mpo1221o dengan rasio menang 9:1 yang besar dan menyenangkan. tindak kecurangan akan langsung di tindak di tempat dan juga keamanan tingkat tinggi yang pasti untuk membuat para pemain merasa nyaman.

item.title: Divora [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Divora [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: bimex
item.itunes:summary:
Divora
(Chat & Messenging)
"💰 Unlock AI Excellence Without Breaking the Bank! 🚀
Introducing Divora – Your Affordable AI Solution! 🤖
🌟 Don't break the bank for AI! Divora is here for you, empowering everyone, from small businesses to passionate enthusiasts, without costing a fortune! 💸
👩‍💼 Small business owner? 🙋‍♂️ AI enthusiast? Divora welcomes you all with open arms! 🎉
🎩 Say goodbye to costly development! No need to spend millions. Divora's budget-friendly approach makes AI accessible to all! 💰🚀
🔍 No more digging through endless open-source articles or colabs that don't work! Just upload your data, and Divora takes care of the rest. It's AI made easy! 🪄
🧠 For the true AI pioneers, Divora offers complete control over AI training. Build from scratch without breaking the bank! 💡
💡 And here's the game-changer: After training, Divora lets you export the simple code. Your AI, your code, your rules! 📦🛠️
Ready to embrace AI without the high costs and frustrations? Join the AI revolution with Divora! 🌐Your affordable AI adventure begins right here, as of now, anyone including you can build your very one AI🚀✨"

[read more]

Ready to embrace AI without the high costs and frustrations? Join the AI revolution with Divora! 🌐Your affordable AI adventure begins right here, as of now, anyone including you can build your very one AI🚀✨"

🌟 Don't break the bank for AI! Divora is here for you, empowering everyone, from small businesses to passionate enthusiasts, without costing a fortune! 💸
👩‍💼 Small business owner? 🙋‍♂️ AI enthusiast? Divora welcomes you all with open arms! 🎉
🎩 Say goodbye to costly development! No need to spend millions. Divora's budget-friendly approach makes AI accessible to all! 💰🚀
🔍 No more digging through endless open-source articles or colabs that don't work! Just upload your data, and Divora takes care of the rest. It's AI made easy! 🪄
🧠 For the true AI pioneers, Divora offers complete control over AI training. Build from scratch without breaking the bank! 💡
💡 And here's the game-changer: After training, Divora lets you export the simple code. Your AI, your code, your rules! 📦🛠️
Ready to embrace AI without the high costs and frustrations? Join the AI revolution with Divora! 🌐Your affordable AI adventure begins right here, as of now, anyone including you can build your very one AI🚀✨"

item.title: Shadow Kernel [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: Shadow Kernel [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: scaledzdn
item.itunes:summary:
Shadow Kernel
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Shadow Kernel for Poco M3 and Redmi 9T (chime/juice)
Android 11-14 with KSU and Non-KSU Supported.

Android 11-14 with KSU and Non-KSU Supported.

(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))

item.title: Samsung Music [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Samsung Music [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: ayrahikari
item.itunes:summary:
Samsung Music
(Audioplayers)
Samsung Music Port for Non-Samsung ROM.
What difference between Spotify and Melon version?
- Spotify version has Spotify tab, it commonly used for global region Samsung devices
- Melon version has Melon in bottom tab, used for Korean devices
- Melon version has some UI changes, like search button will be in bottom tab instead of search button
- Both are same, but you need install one of mentioned apps (Spotify or Melon from playstore) to use their services
[read more]
item.description:
Samsung Music
(Audioplayers)
Samsung Music Port for Non-Samsung ROM.
What difference between Spotify and Melon version?
- Spotify version has Spotify tab, it commonly used for global region Samsung devices
- Melon version has Melon in bottom tab, used for Korean devices
- Melon version has some UI changes, like search button will be in bottom tab instead of search button
- Both are same, but you need install one of mentioned apps (Spotify or Melon from playstore) to use their services
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Samsung Music
(Audioplayers)
Samsung Music Port for Non-Samsung ROM.
What difference between Spotify and Melon version?
- Spotify version has Spotify tab, it commonly used for global region Samsung devices
- Melon version has Melon in bottom tab, used for Korean devices
- Melon version has some UI changes, like search button will be in bottom tab instead of search button
- Both are same, but you need install one of mentioned apps (Spotify or Melon from playstore) to use their services

item.title: OCTWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: OCTWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
OCTWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The OctWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your gaming experience in multiplayer shooting games. Its primary objective is to maximize aim assist, providing players with a competitive edge by improving their aiming accuracy. Additionally, this module addresses the limitations of gyro controls, optimizing the gyro's performance for a smoother and more precise gaming experience. OctWing is an invaluable resource for gamers seeking to elevate their skill levels and dominate in multiplayer shooting games.

[read more]
item.description:
OCTWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The OctWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your gaming experience in multiplayer shooting games. Its primary objective is to maximize aim assist, providing players with a competitive edge by improving their aiming accuracy. Additionally, this module addresses the limitations of gyro controls, optimizing the gyro's performance for a smoother and more precise gaming experience. OctWing is an invaluable resource for gamers seeking to elevate their skill levels and dominate in multiplayer shooting games.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
OCTWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The OctWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your gaming experience in multiplayer shooting games. Its primary objective is to maximize aim assist, providing players with a competitive edge by improving their aiming accuracy. Additionally, this module addresses the limitations of gyro controls, optimizing the gyro's performance for a smoother and more precise gaming experience. OctWing is an invaluable resource for gamers seeking to elevate their skill levels and dominate in multiplayer shooting games.

[read more]

item.title: Radeon-Profile and Tweaker Qt6 [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Radeon-Profile and Tweaker Qt6 [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: VectoR
item.itunes:summary:
Radeon-Profile and Tweaker Qt6
(Utilities)
Simple Qt6 application to read current clocks of ATi Radeon cards
Functionality
Monitoring of basic GPU parameters (frequencies, voltages, usage, temperature, fan speed)
DPM profiles and power levels
Fan control (HD 7000+), definition of multiple custom curves or fixed speed
Overclocking (amdgpu) (Wattman, Overdrive, PowerPlay etc)
Per app profiles/Event definitions (i.e. change fan profile when temp above defined or set DPM to high when selected binary executed)
Define binaries to run with set of environment variablees (i.e. GALLIUM_HUD, MESA, LIBGL etc)
[read more]
item.description:
Radeon-Profile and Tweaker Qt6
(Utilities)
Simple Qt6 application to read current clocks of ATi Radeon cards
Functionality
Monitoring of basic GPU parameters (frequencies, voltages, usage, temperature, fan speed)
DPM profiles and power levels
Fan control (HD 7000+), definition of multiple custom curves or fixed speed
Overclocking (amdgpu) (Wattman, Overdrive, PowerPlay etc)
Per app profiles/Event definitions (i.e. change fan profile when temp above defined or set DPM to high when selected binary executed)
Define binaries to run with set of environment variablees (i.e. GALLIUM_HUD, MESA, LIBGL etc)
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Radeon-Profile and Tweaker Qt6
(Utilities)
Simple Qt6 application to read current clocks of ATi Radeon cards
Functionality
Monitoring of basic GPU parameters (frequencies, voltages, usage, temperature, fan speed)
DPM profiles and power levels
Fan control (HD 7000+), definition of multiple custom curves or fixed speed
Overclocking (amdgpu) (Wattman, Overdrive, PowerPlay etc)
Per app profiles/Event definitions (i.e. change fan profile when temp above defined or set DPM to high when selected binary executed)
Define binaries to run with set of environment variablees (i.e. GALLIUM_HUD, MESA, LIBGL etc)
[read more]
